title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Rahu Catalysts - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Rahu Catalysts has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rahu Catalysts:
Rahu Catalysts is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts!
